name: Momotaro
title: Peachy Big Sister
description: Momo Fujiwara shared the same father as Reina, yet she was born to a woman who was never his wife. Because she was acknowledged by her father, her family name in the registry was Fujiwara, but Momo and her mother were kept at a distance from the main family, living in a detached house on the Fujiwara estate.

localization.name: Peach Cut
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each time this skill has damaged a burning or sleeping enemy while on the battlefield (max of 750% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The first time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, the user will get the next turn by having their TU reduced to 0. Then this skill becomes usable only if the user's party has 2 or less Spirit.

localization.name: Heartful Push
localization.description: Exchanges 1 random non-sleeping, non-immovable enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 200TU, minus 25TU per awakening (100TU if the user has 4 Awakenings). Usable only if there are 4 enemies on the battlefield, at least 2 of them are not Imposters, and a valid target exists. Usable 15 times per battle.

localization.name: Inescapable Love
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted a Power Charge. 700% damage instead if the target is sleeping or burning. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

If this damage does not defeat the target, the user exchanges that enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This will not trigger if the target is Immovable or if there are less than 4 enemies on the battlefield (no Imposter will be added), and cannot trigger more than 3 times per battle.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.
localization.selected: 500%+ damage, may Exchange enemy with Imposter

localization.name: Peachburst
localization.description: 800% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Minus 100% damage for each enemy on the battlefield that is not burning or sleeping (max of -400% if 4 enemies are not burning or sleeping). If this attack damages a target, the user's Power Charge is consumed. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.
localization.selected: Up to 800% damage, ignores damage reduction

localization.name: Demon Slayer
localization.description:
This unit cannot be burned, or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a sleeping or burning enemy on the battlefield, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while it does not have its Active Skills disabled, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0.

This unit's attacks:
- Will not wake sleeping enemies.
- Heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.
- Remove burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from hit targets.
- Then grant hit targets the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This effect cannot trigger if Momotaro has no other allies on the battlefield.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Fire Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by Fire units.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
